title: Integration tests and codegen verification
description:
Add integration and codegen tests verifying all new features work together.

Modify `tests/integration/e2e_test.go`:
- Add compile-only test for `examples/raycaster.ryx` (headless, no display)
- Add compile-only test for `examples/image_viewer.ryx` (headless, no display)
- Verify the `closure_mut_capture` test case runs and produces expected output

Modify `pkg/codegen/codegen_test.go`:
- Add test: compile a closure with a mutable capture that is assigned inside an `if` block
- Verify that `OpStoreUpvalue` is emitted for the assignment (NOT `OpStoreLocal`)
- This validates the end-to-end fix from MIR through codegen

Read for context:
- `tests/integration/e2e_test.go` (existing compile/run test patterns)
- `pkg/codegen/codegen_test.go` (existing codegen test patterns, disassembly helpers)

Run full test suite: `go test ./...`

Acceptance: `go test ./...` all green, no regressions.
